response.justification: While this candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and excellent communication skills, they lack the mandatory technical requirements for the role. Professional C++ experience is limited to approximately 6 months at National Instruments; their career is built primarily on JavaScript/TypeScript, D, and web technologies. SQL experience is documented only in MySQL and MongoDB, not SQL Server or Oracle. Capital markets domain knowledge is essentially absent, with only tangential fintech exposure at RIDE Capital rather than fixed-income or investment-banking experience. The skills gap on all mandatory requirements is too significant for this mid-senior capital markets development role.
strengths: Excellent communication and technical teaching skills, with extensive workshop and course delivery experience
Strong software craftsmanship practices including TDD, CI/CD, and architectural thinking demonstrated across 17+ years
Some exposure to financial technology through RIDE Capital fintech investment platform work
concerns: Only ~6 months of documented professional C++ experience; entire career trajectory is JavaScript/TypeScript, D, and web development—not capital markets systems
Database experience limited to MySQL and MongoDB; no evidence of SQL Server, Oracle, or enterprise-scale relational database work
No demonstrated fixed-income, derivatives, or capital markets domain knowledge; fintech experience was general investment platform tooling, not trading or derivatives systems

key_factors.factor: No SQL Server/Oracle enterprise database experience
Absent capital markets or fixed-income domain knowledge
